'''wadhoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oaf|oaf]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oaf|oaf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wadhoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wædheyeth|wædheyeth]] || [[word:wædheyej|wædheyej]] || [[word:wædheyesh|wædheyesh]] || [[word:wædheye|wædheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wadhodhoyoth|wadhodhoyoth]] || [[word:wadhodhoyoj|wadhodhoyoj]] || [[word:wadhodhoyosh|wadhodhoyosh]] || [[word:wadhodhoyo|wadhodhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wadhoyoth|wadhoyoth]] || [[word:wadhoyoj|wadhoyoj]] || [[word:wadhoyosh|wadhoyosh]] || [[word:wadhoyo|wadhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wadhofyoth|wadhofyoth]] || [[word:wadhofyoj|wadhofyoj]] || [[word:wadhofyosh|wadhofyosh]] || [[word:wadhofyof|wadhofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wadhoyotho|wadhoyotho]] || [[word:wadhoyojo|wadhoyojo]] || [[word:wadhoyosho|wadhoyosho]] || [[word:wadhoyoko|wadhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wadhoyoth|wadhoyoth]] || [[word:wadhoyoj|wadhoyoj]] || [[word:wadhoyosh|wadhoyosh]] || [[word:wadhoyo|wadhoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wadhoyothol|wadhoyothol]] || [[word:wadhoyojol|wadhoyojol]] || [[word:wadhoyoshol|wadhoyoshol]] || [[word:wadhoyokol|wadhoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wadhoyothotho|wadhoyothotho]] || [[word:wadhoyojojo|wadhoyojojo]] || [[word:wadhoyoshosho|wadhoyoshosho]] || [[word:wadhoyoko|wadhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wadhoyothon|wadhoyothon]] || [[word:wadhoyojon|wadhoyojon]] || [[word:wadhoyoshon|wadhoyoshon]] || [[word:wadhoyokon|wadhoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wadhoyothoro|wadhoyothoro]] || [[word:wadhoyojoro|wadhoyojoro]] || [[word:wadhoyoshoro|wadhoyoshoro]] || [[word:wadhoyokoro|wadhoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
